subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Thou seest mine eyes fixed upon the horizon of Thy grace, and the hands of this poor one raised unto the heaven of Thy bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری عینی ناظره الی افق فضلک و ایادی الفقیر مرتفعه الی سماء جودک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @martyrs and martyrdom, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
